findings.description: The formula for C_{22} is given as M_1 - M_2 + M_3 + M_6, but the correct Strassen formula is C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_3 + M_6 — actually this needs verification: expanding M1-M2+M3+M6 = (A11+A22)(B11+B22) - (A21+A22)B11 + A11(B12-B22) + (A21-A11)(B11+B12). The correct C_{22} = A_{21}B_{12} + A_{22}B_{22}, and the standard Strassen formula is C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_3 + M_6, which does not equal A_{21}B_{12} + A_{22}B_{22}; the correct formula is C_{22} = M_1 + M_3 - M_5 + M_6 (some conventions) or equivalently M_1 - M_2 + M_4 + M_7 — specifically, the block C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_3 + M_6 is incorrect; the standard result is C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_4 + M_7.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_3 + M_6 with C_{22} = M_1 - M_2 + M_4 + M_7, which correctly yields A_{21}B_{12} + A_{22}B_{22} when expanded with the given M_i definitions.

findings.description: The pseudocode reconstructs C22 = M1 - M2 + M3 + M6, which is inconsistent with the correct Strassen formula C22 = M1 - M2 + M4 + M7 (using the M_i definitions given in the topic).
findings.suggested_fix: Change the C22 line in the pseudocode to: C22 = M1 - M2 + M4 + M7.
